note: NEW: MINING ATTEMPTS card surfaces submitblock telemetry from the local node since boot — received, accepted, rejected counts plus a click-to-expand panel with top rejection reasons (e.g. 'v2 header missing miner_pubkey', 'ValidatePostForkTimestamp', 'bits_q mismatch') and per-IP rejection sources (P2P relay path only). Powered by the new getminerstats RPC (non-consensus, telemetry-only). Lifetime counters; not persisted across restarts. Card colour: green if reject ratio <20%, amber 20–50%, red >50%. UPDATED MINERS card (v136) preserved. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
